title: Repository Security Gate
description: Portable repository-owned security classification, pinned scanner provenance, static rules, evidence contracts, and exact-head review packets.
writes_allowed: consumer repository workflow, policy, suppression, and security-report paths approved by the user
notes: Install the complete version-pinned skill folder; do not depend solely on a mutable branch or cross-organisation reusable workflow.
The pack does not bundle scanner engines or third-party rule packs.
Tool downloads and quarantined candidate execution require explicit approval and exact lock verification.
No live target, production DAST, credential, private data, provider, database, object storage, browser history, or Docker daemon is authorised.
